title: Bootstrap repo and planning
notes: Project skeleton, planning docs, base tooling.

title: Scenario catalog and fixtures
notes: Define core auth scenarios, mock APIs, and seed data for flows.

title: Auth state machine core
notes: Implement XState machines for login, refresh, logout, and error paths with mocked transitions.

title: Flow visualizer UI
notes: Timeline/graph view of state transitions with step controls.

title: Token & cookie inspector
notes: Panel showing access/refresh tokens, expiry, rotations, and cookie flags per step.

title: Edge case lab
notes: Preset scenarios: clock skew, multi-tab logout, failed callback, stale refresh token.
